---
title: "Projects"
---

# Project Portfolio

This section presents three portfolio projects that reflect my academic development in marketing analysis, business intelligence, and quantitative risk analysis.

## Project 1 — Park Polish Marketing Analysis

This project focuses on market analysis, competitor positioning, and strategic marketing insights for the Park Polish business concept.

[Open Project 1](project1_park_polish.qmd){.primary-btn}

## Project 2 — TechNova Power BI Analysis

This project uses Microsoft Power BI to analyse TechNova’s financial performance from 2015 to 2024.

[Open Project 2](project2_power_bi.qmd){.primary-btn}

## Project 3 — Risk Management and Hedging Analysis

This project presents Excel-based quantitative work on market risk, portfolio risk, and hedging analysis.

[Open Project 3](project3_risk_management.qmd){.primary-btn}
